GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [o_totalprice@4 DESC, o_orderdate@3 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_name@0, c_custkey@1, o_orderkey@2, o_orderdate@3, o_totalprice@4], 8), input_partitions=8
          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
              GpuHashJoinExec
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuFilterExec
                    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_orderkey], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_orderkey], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                  GpuHashJoinExec
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@2], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                          GpuHashJoinExec
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12201611
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=12201611
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=84, subtree_max_row_bytes=176

                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=84, subtree_max_row_bytes=176

                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=68, subtree_max_row_bytes=144
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=68, subtree_max_row_bytes=144

                              GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40
                                GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40

                                GpuScanExec: row_width=36, subtree_max_row_bytes=36
